name: SKU Capacity
body: [{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"How many SKUs can Merchandising Cloud handle?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To data, Merchandising Cloud has load tested with more than 3 million individual SKUs. These tests were successful and did not result in any issues."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Currently, Merchandising Cloud works without issue with clients running up to almost 1 million SKUs."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"👍 In the future, Merchandising Cloud may decide to load test with larger SKU numbers, should the need arise. If and when that happens, this page will be updated accordingly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
